audit_metadata.description: Website audit configuration with technical, content, and visual checks

technical_checks.name: Page Title
technical_checks.description: Page title missing or too short
technical_checks.remediation: Add a descriptive page title (10-60 characters) that includes target keywords

technical_checks.name: Meta Description
technical_checks.remediation: Add a compelling meta description (150-160 characters) that summarizes page content

technical_checks.name: Mobile Friendly
technical_checks.description: Not mobile-friendly - missing viewport meta tag

technical_checks.name: H1 Heading
technical_checks.description: Missing H1 heading - poor SEO and accessibility
technical_checks.remediation: Add a single, descriptive H1 tag as the main page heading

technical_checks.name: Multiple H1s
technical_checks.description: Multiple H1 tags found - confuses search engines
technical_checks.remediation: Keep only one H1 per page; use H2-H6 for subheadings

technical_checks.name: Image Alt Text
technical_checks.description: Too many images without alt text - impacts SEO and accessibility
technical_checks.remediation: Add descriptive alt text to all images (at least 30% coverage recommended)

technical_checks.name: Analytics Tracking
technical_checks.description: No Google Analytics or tracking detected
technical_checks.remediation: Implement Google Analytics or similar tool to track visitor behavior

technical_checks.name: SSL/HTTPS
technical_checks.description: Website not using HTTPS - security risk and SEO penalty
technical_checks.remediation: Install SSL certificate and redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS

technical_checks.name: Page Load Time
technical_checks.description: Slow page load time - impacts user experience and rankings
technical_checks.remediation: Optimize images, leverage caching, minimize CSS/JS, consider CDN

technical_checks.name: Contact Information
technical_checks.description: No contact page or contact information found
technical_checks.remediation: Add a dedicated contact page with email, phone, or contact form

technical_checks.name: Social Media Links
technical_checks.remediation: Add links to active social media profiles to build credibility

technical_checks.name: Call-to-Action
technical_checks.remediation: Add prominent, actionable CTAs throughout the site (buttons, forms)

llm_audit.system_message: You are a professional website quality auditor with expertise in conversion optimization, UX, and digital marketing. Analyze websites critically and provide actionable insights. Output ONLY valid JSON.

visual_audit.system_message: You are an expert web design and UX auditor. Analyze website screenshots for design quality, usability, and conversion potential. Output ONLY valid JSON with structured observations.
visual_audit.prompt_template:
Analyze the website screenshot for '{business_name}'.

Evaluate the following aspects:

1. **Visual Design & Branding**
   - Color scheme consistency and appeal
   - Typography: hierarchy, readability
   - Whitespace and layout balance
   - Brand identity coherence

2. **User Interface Elements**
   - Button clarity and prominence
   - Navigation clarity and accessibility
   - Form fields and input clarity
   - Icon usage and appropriateness

3. **Mobile Responsiveness**
   - Touch target sizes
   - Layout adaptation for mobile
   - Text readability on small screens

4. **Conversion & UX**
   - Visual hierarchy guides user attention
   - CTAs are prominent and compelling
   - Visual flow toward conversion goals
   - Clutter or distraction elements

5. **Trust & Credibility**
   - Professional appearance
   - Trust signals visibility (testimonials, badges, logos)
   - Outdated or broken elements
   - Contact information prominence

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{{
  "visual_score": <0-100>,
  "design_quality": <0-100>,
  "usability_score": <0-100>,
  "conversion_potential": <0-100>,
  "observations": [
    {{
      "category": "design|ui|mobile|conversion|trust|performance",
      "severity": "critical|warning|info",
      "description": "specific observation",
      "location": "header|hero|nav|content|footer|sidebar",
      "recommendation": "actionable improvement"
    }}
  ]
}}

additional_checks.name: Portfolio/Gallery
additional_checks.description: No portfolio or project gallery found - critical for design businesses
additional_checks.remediation: Create a dedicated portfolio section showcasing completed design projects

additional_checks.name: Before/After Examples
additional_checks.remediation: Add before/after photos and transformation showcases

additional_checks.name: GitHub Profile
additional_checks.remediation: Link to GitHub profile to showcase coding skills

additional_checks.name: Case Studies
additional_checks.description: No case studies or client success stories
additional_checks.remediation: Publish detailed case studies with metrics and client results
